news.title: Inside the Global AI Infrastructure Boom Driven by OpenAI, Google, and Anthropic

news.description: The energy inside Madison Square Garden was infectious as the New York Knicks went up 2-0 on Thursday. Josh Hart led the way as he posted a playoff career high of 26 points in the Knicks’ 109-93 victory over the Cavaliers.

news.title: UK Retail Sales Plunge as Iran War Leads to Fewer Car Trips
news.description: UK retail sales fell at the fastest pace in nearly a year as consumers pulled back spending and made fewer car journeys amid the global energy shock from war in Iran.

news.title: First Oil Tanker to Exit Hormuz since War Expected in Japan
news.description: Japan - one of Asia's biggest importers of energy from the Middle East - flagged the impending arrival of the first Persian Gulf oil shipment to transit the contested Strait of Hormuz since the Iran war began.
